resultList.dtldesc: This ready-to-move villa on Hosa Road, Bangalore offers an exceptional blend of luxury, space, and connectivity, making it an ideal choice for families seeking premium independent living in one of Bangalores rapidly growing residential corridors. Spread across an expansive 3580 sq. ft, the villa is thoughtfully designed with spacious interiors, elegant finishes, and modern functionality. Located close to major IT hubs and metro connectivity, the property provides a comfortable lifestyle with excellent accessibility to commercial centres, schools, hospitals, and entertainment zones. Hosa Road continues to witness strong residential demand due to its strategic location between Electronic City and Sarjapur Road.Property SpecificationsThe villa comes in semi-furnished condition and features 3 spacious bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and 3 balconies that allow abundant natural light and ventilation throughout the home. The layout includes separate living and dining areas, offering enhanced privacy and functionality for family living. The kitchen is equipped with essential fittings and the interiors are finished with premium marble flooring that enhances the overall elegance of the property. The villa is north-east facing, considered favourable for natural light and airflow. The property also includes 2 covered car parking spaces and is designed to provide a luxurious independent living experience within a peaceful residential setting.FacilitiesResidents benefit from essential modern amenities including power backup, water supply, security provisions, and covered parking. The spacious design and independent villa layout provide enhanced privacy and comfortable living for families. The surrounding locality features gated residential developments, landscaped surroundings, and growing civic infrastructure, making it highly suitable for premium residential living. Hosa Road has emerged as a preferred destination for villas and gated communities due to improving infrastructure and proximity to major employment hubs.LocalityLocated on Hosa Road, Bangalore, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to Electronic City, Sarjapur Road, Outer Ring Road, HSR Layout, and major IT corridors. Metro connectivity is available within approximately 700 metres, while essential facilities and public transport are accessible within 1 km, ensuring convenient daily commuting. BMTC feeder services and metro expansion in the region have further improved last-mile connectivity for residents. The locality is surrounded by reputed schools, hospitals, supermarkets, restaurants, and shopping centres, making it highly suitable for families and professionals. Discussions among Bengaluru residents frequently highlight Hosa Road for its strong connectivity, gated communities, and proximity to tech parks, though traffic growth due to rapid development is also commonly discussed.

resultList.dtldesc: Visit this beautiful 3 BHK flat for sale in Sattva East Crest, Old Madras Road, Bangalore, for ready-to-move possession starting August. This newly built home provides contemporary living in a central location, ideal for families who value comfort and accessibility. Dont lose the opportunity to call this lovely flat your new homeProperty SpecificationsOffering a well-designed 3 BHK flat which is Vaastu compliant and north-east facing, situated on the 4th floor of a well-built building with a total of 15 floors. The residence has a super area of 1425 sqft with a carpet area of 1000 sqft, providing sufficient space for easy living.The flat is fully equipped with fans and lights in all the rooms, in addition to wardrobes in all the bedrooms for convenience. The flat has three bedrooms and two bathrooms, one of which is an attached bathroom with a geyser and another common bathroom, both western-style-designed. Take in the natural view from the two balconies, one off the living room and the other off the master bedroom, both with a view of the beautiful gardenpark and the pool.The plan features a separate living and dining space, supplemented with a modular kitchen that has a chimney and piped gas supply connection, and a utility area attached to it. The vitrified tile flooring is provided across the flat to make it durable and good-looking.FacilitiesThe property provides good facilities comprising two covered car parking spaces along with open car parking. A 24-hour water supply comes from both corporation and borewell sources, along with 100 power backup for a seamless life. Safety comes first, with a permanent guard on premises and CCTVs installed for added security. The building has two lifts for hassle-free movement.Residents can avail all kinds of amenities like swimming pool, clubhouse, indoor games, party hall, childrens play area, squash court, gym, tennis court, and beautifully well-maintained parks and gardens, hence creating a dynamic community life.LocalitySituated across Brigade Exotica, this pocket provides a prime spot with a plethora of amenities at your doorstep. Hospitals, schools, and malls are all nearby, making it easy to access necessary services and shopping. The area has good public transport available, with auto-rickshaws and buses plying the area regularly. Furthermore, banks and ATMs are also in the vicinity for easy transactions, and the railway station is only 6 km away, making it very convenient for commuters.

resultList.dtldesc: Beautifully designed to provide utmost comfort and convenience, this well planned 5BHK villa nestled in Cox Town, Bangalore is worth buying. This property is the ultimate choice for families seeking a spacious and comfortable dwelling place in a prime location. So what are you waiting for Hurry up and seize the dealProperty SpecificationsFacing the promising west direction, this villa is crafted in accordance with Vaastu guidelines for the well being and happiness of the residents. With a super area of 3800 sqft and carpet area of 2800 sqft, this villa is spread across the ground floor, first floor and second floor 1st and 2nd floor are a duplex unit.On the ground floor, there are 2 bedrooms, living room, dining room, pooja room, kitchen, work area, storage room, garage and 2 attached western fashioned bathrooms fitted with geysers. Coming to the duplex unit, the first floor features 1 bedroom, drawing room, kitchen, work area and 1 common western fashioned bathroom equipped with a geyser. Lastly, the second floor has 2 bedrooms and 2 attached bathrooms designed in western manner with geysers. There is also a small terrace available ideal for having your morning or evening walk. At the top there is an overhead tank available. Moreover, the kitchen is well appointed with a cooking countertop and sink to ensure convenient cooking. Additionally, there is a utility attached to the kitchen. The kitchen and living room are adorned with vitrified flooring while the first floor has mosaic flooring and the flooring of the ground floor is under maintenance. Wardrobe is available in the first floor bedroom for storage purposes. This pet friendly abode is ideal to live with your family members. FacilitiesOne covered parking space and corporation water supply are available. There are 2 inverters available in case of power cuts. LocalityTop notch schools,hospitals, shopping malls and supermarkets are present within a range of 1km from this property. You can also find major banks and ATMs within 100 meters for all your financial transactions. The Jeevanahalli Bus Stop is the nearest landmark for this property while the railway station and metro station are located at a distance of 2km and 6km respectively, thus promising great connectivity.
